history.reasoning: Sector B has twice the connections of Sector A, so 2 * 240 = 480. The sum of Sectors A and B is 240 + 480 = 720. Sector C has 180 fewer connections than this sum, so 720 - 180 = 540. Total connections are the sum of all sectors: 240 + 480 + 540 = 1260.

final_answer.reasoning: Sector B has twice the connections of Sector A, so 2 * 240 = 480. The sum of Sectors A and B is 240 + 480 = 720. Sector C has 180 fewer connections than this sum, so 720 - 180 = 540. Total connections are the sum of all sectors: 240 + 480 + 540 = 1260.
